messages.noPermission: You do not have permission for that action.
messages.globalSelectionUnsupported: Global regions do not use two-point bounds.
messages.selectionWorldMismatch: Your selection must be in the same world as the region.
messages.invalidSelectionAmount: Selection amount must be an integer from 1 to 500 that keeps the selection valid.
messages.regionRedefined: Region {name} redefined from your current selection.
messages.regionDeleteConfirmRequired: Run /hg delete {name} --confirm to delete this region.
messages.regionAlreadyExists: A region with that name already exists.
messages.regionOverlapConflict: That selection overlaps a region owned by another player.
messages.regionListEmpty: No regions found in this world.
messages.invalidRegionName: Region names must be 3-32 characters and use only letters, numbers, underscores, or dashes.
messages.invalidPriority: Priority must be an integer from 0 to 100.
messages.invalidFlagValue: Unknown flag value. Use ALLOW, DENY, INHERIT, ALLOW_MEMBERS, ALLOW_TRUSTED, or clear.
messages.invalidPage: Page must be a positive integer.
messages.playerLookupFailed: Player not found online or in saved player data.
messages.invalidRole: Unknown role. Use CO_OWNER, MANAGER, MEMBER, TRUSTED, or VISITOR.
messages.cannotAssignOwner: OWNER cannot be assigned with member commands.
messages.cannotRemoveOwner: The region owner cannot be removed.
messages.memberNotFound: That player is not a member of region {name}.
messages.memberReplaceConfirm: {player} is already a member with role {role}. Repeat the command with --confirm to replace it.
messages.tpDenied: You do not have permission to teleport to that region.
messages.debugPosNone: No regions contain your current position.
messages.saveCompleted: Pending region saves flushed to disk.
messages.reloadCompleted: Configuration and regions reloaded from disk.
messages.help: Commands: /hg wand, /hg create <name>, /hg delete <name> --confirm, /hg info [name], /hg list, /hg select <name>, /hg redefine <name>, /hg expand <dir> <amount>, /hg contract <dir> <amount>, /hg shift <dir> <amount>, /hg priority <name> <value>, /hg flag <name> <flag> <value|clear> [text], /hg flags <name>, /hg member <subcommand>, /hg tp <name>, /hg setspawn <name>, /hg gui [name], /hg backup, /hg debug pos, /hg bypass, /hg save, /hg reload, /hg help [topic]
